jdk.dynalink.linker/LinkRequest/isCallSi.name: isCallSiteUnstable
jdk.dynalink.linker/LinkRequest/isCallSi.description:
Returns true if the call site is considered unstable, that is, it has been relinked more times than was
specified inDynamicLinkerFactory.setUnstableRelinkThreshold(int).
